title: Interface + abstract class + custom-to-custom inheritance
instruction: In the sandbox model, create: (1) an interface ConIDemoNoteRenderer with one method signature, str render() (X++ interfaces are stored as plain AxClass XML with 'interface' in the Declaration -- an empty-body method entry, not a semicolon-terminated signature); (2) an abstract class DemoNoteRendererBase that implements ConIDemoNoteRenderer, provides a concrete render() returning '[Note] ' + this.renderContent(), and declares an abstract method protected abstract str renderContent() (also an empty-body method entry, per X++ convention -- never a semicolon); (3) a concrete class DemoNotePlainRenderer that extends DemoNoteRendererBase and overrides renderContent() to return 'Plain note content'. This demonstrates custom-to-custom class inheritance (the concrete class extends a CUSTOM abstract base, not a platform base class). All three must build clean.
